appliedUpdates.description: Added setuptools build-backend quirk note to environment.md (use setuptools.build_meta, not internal backend path)
Fixed architecture.md: replaced non-existent bar_types.py with actual csv_loader.py in project structure

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Coding Conventions: 'Build artifacts (src/ra.egg-info/, __pycache__/, *.pyc) should not be committed to git. A .gitignore should be maintained at repo root.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature project-scaffolding-config committed src/ra.egg-info/ directory to git (build artifact from pip install -e).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add to Key Technical Notes: '4H Aggregation: Uses clock-aligned 240-minute floor (00:00,04:00,08:00,12:00,16:00,20:00 NY) producing 31 bars, not forex-day-aligned windows (17:00,21:00,...) which would produce 30 bars. This matches the regression target.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature data-layer discovered that clock-aligned 4H produces 31 bars (matching target), while forex-day-aligned would produce 30. Decision undocumented in AGENTS.md.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: In ra-engine-worker skill, add note to Steps 3-4: 'For scaffolding/data-layer features without baseline fixtures, skip Step 3 (study baseline fixture) and write tests alongside implementation instead of strict red-green TDD.'
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both project-scaffolding-config and data-layer workers noted that the 'write failing tests first' procedure doesn't cleanly apply to non-detector features. Same feedback from two independent workers.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml has empty strings for typecheck, lint, and build commands
rejectedObservations.reason: Already known — no typecheck/lint/build tools are configured for this project. Not actionable.
